Classifications.Text: * See ATTRIBUTION.md for third-party sources and credits.
* The minimal UART RX and TX modules in this repository are original implementations
* inspired by common FPGA UART examples, including:
* - Sends one 8-bit byte over a UART TX line in 8N1 format.
* - Asserts busy while a transfer is in progress.
* - data_in is captured only when a new transfer begins.
* - busy stays high from start-bit launch until the stop bit completes.
/* Although the project config is in a parent directory, the Makefile should include
* a proper directory parameter for yoysys to find it with no path:
* But the GH FPGA action: python tt/tt_tool.py --create-user-config $FLOW_ARG
* does not include the path in the Makefile at this time. So we see an error:
*   2026-05-21 07:40:04,633 - project    - ERROR    - yosys port read failed for [000 : unknown]
* Here we assume another file has included the project_config.v, with error checks for zero values.
* shift_reg holds remaining bits to transmit.
* The LSB is always the next data bit sent.
/* Line is idle-high when not transmitting. */
* Capture the byte and immediately drive the start bit.
* The first data bit will be
/* Put the first payload bit on the line. */
/* All eight data bits have completed; drive the stop bit high. */
/* Continue shifting out remaining data bits. */

Tags.HoverText: The module declaration is the only design unit in Verilog. It describes both a design's interface to other designs in the same environment, and its functional composition.

Parameters are constants that can be modified with the defparam statement or through parameter passing in the module instance statement. Parameters are local to the module in which they have been declared.

Parameters are constants that can be modified with the defparam statement or through parameter passing in the module instance statement. Parameters are local to the module in which they have been declared.

The reserved word input is a port definition providing a means of interconnecting hardware descriptions consisting of modules, primitives, and macromodules. For example, module X can instantiate module Y, using port connections appropriate to module X. These port names can differ from the names of the internal nets and registers specified in the definition of module Y.

Wire nets connect elements. The net-type wire is identical in syntax and function to the net-type tri. A wire net can be used for nets that are driven by a single gate or continuous assignment. Logical conflicts from multiple sources on a wire net result in unknown values unless the net is controlled by logic strength.

These port names can differ from the names of the internal nets and registers specified in the definition of module Y.

A reg is an abstraction of a data storage element. The reg stores a value from one assignment to the next. An assignment statement in a procedure acts as a trigger that changes the value in the data storage element. Reg data types can only be assigned inside of the procedural, initial, always blocks or when they are declared.

Generate blocks are used to create multiple instances of an object within a module. The reserved word generate begins a generate block.
Conditional logic statement. Presents a condition to be evaluated as true or false.
A begin-end block is a means of grouping two or more procedural assignments together so that they act like a single group of sequential statements.
Marks the end of a statement, subprogram, or declaration of a library unit.

Logical conflicts from multiple sources on a wire net result in unknown values unless the net is controlled by logic strength.
The assign statement is used to express the first type of procedural continuous assignment. Assign of reg data types is not supported.

Local parameters are identical to parameters, but cannot be directly modified with a defparam statement. A localparam can be assigned the value of parameter constants, and can be indirectly refined from outside the module. A localparam cannot be used within the module port parameter list.

An always represents a block of code in a design.

Value changes on nets and registers can be used as events to trigger the execution of a statement. This is known as detecting an implicit event. The event can be based on the direction of the change towards the value 1 (posedge) or towards the value 0 (negedge).
A begin-end block is a means of grouping two or more procedural assignments together so that they act like a single group of sequential statements.

The case reserved word is used in case statements. The case statement is a multiway decision statement that tests whether an expression matches one of a number of other expressions and branches accordingly.
